task_completion.description: Create ground station 'Denver_School' with correct coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' dialog or ground station list showing 'Denver_School' with Latitude 39.7312, Longitude -104.9674 (or 104.9674 W), and Altitude 1609m.

task_completion.description: Create ground station 'Telebridge_Italy' with correct coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' dialog or ground station list showing 'Telebridge_Italy' with Latitude 45.1333, Longitude 8.4500 (or 8.4500 E), and Altitude 116m.

task_completion.description: Create module 'ARISS_Contact' tracking ISS (ZARYA) and ISS (NAUKA)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module or tab named 'ARISS_Contact'. The list or map within this module must show the satellites ISS (ZARYA) and ISS (NAUKA).

task_completion.description: Create module 'Other_Passes' tracking AO-7, SO-50, AO-73, and AO-85
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module or tab named 'Other_Passes'. The list or map within this module must show the satellites AO-7, SO-50, AO-73, and AO-85.

task_completion.description: Both modules use 'Denver_School' as the ground station
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the module headers, map views, or module configuration dialogs to confirm that 'Denver_School' is set as the active ground station (QTH) for both 'ARISS_Contact' and 'Other_Passes'.

task_completion.description: Configure GPredict to display UTC time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict clock display (should indicate UTC) or the Preferences dialog under 'Time Format' or 'General' showing that UTC time is selected instead of local time.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through GPredict menus, dialogs, and preferences rather than editing configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Modules are genuinely created in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The modules should appear as native UI elements within the GPredict application window, not as mocked-up text or separate images.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands directly writing to GPredict's .config/Gpredict/ directories to create the .qth or .mod files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Denver_School coordinates: 39.7312 N, 104.9674 W, 1609m. Telebridge_Italy coordinates: 45.1333 N, 8.4500 E, 116m. ARISS_Contact module must track ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and ISS (NAUKA) (NORAD 49044). Other_Passes module must track AO-7 (7530), SO-50 (27607), AO-73 (39444), and AO-85 (40967). Both modules must use Denver_School as the ground station.
